item.title: DIY Truck Frame Construction Like a Pro
item.description: A step-by-step look at building or reinforcing a truck frame using proper fabrication techniques, alignment methods, and structural welding. What separates a strong frame from a weak one?

media:content.media:title: DIY Truck Frame Construction Like a Pro
media:content.media:description: A step-by-step look at building or reinforcing a truck frame using proper fabrication techniques, alignment methods, and structural welding. What separates a strong frame from a weak one?

item.title: Fixing Our Bronco With Rust Remover
item.description: Working on the Bronco with rust remover as part of the repair process. A straightforward look at the cleanup and restoration work involved. What would you tackle next?

item.title: Convert Your Pickup to Diesel-Electric
item.description: A look at converting a pickup to diesel-electric power, focusing on the build process and mechanical changes. What parts and modifications would be needed for a project like this?

item.title: First Start-up! F350 With CAT 3126 Swap
item.description: Deboss Garage shows the first start-up of an F350 after a CAT 3126 engine swap. A straightforward look at the build process and mechanical work behind the project. How did the swap come together?

media:content.media:title: First Start-up! F350 With CAT 3126 Swap
media:content.media:description: Deboss Garage shows the first start-up of an F350 after a CAT 3126 engine swap. A straightforward look at the build process and mechanical work behind the project. How did the swap come together?

item.title: The $7,000 Truck That Wasn’t Meant to Be
item.description: A look at the $7,000 truck project and the work behind it. What happens when a build starts off as a truck that wasn’t meant to be?

item.title: How Our Rescued Combine Faced the Blaze
item.description: A rescued combine is put through a fire-related challenge in the garage. The focus is on the machine, the setup, and the hands-on work behind the test. What happened next?

item.title: Resurrecting a Barn-Bound Kenworth After 25 Years
item.description: A Kenworth truck pulled from barn storage after 25 years is carefully inspected, repaired, and brought back toward running condition. What surprises are hidden after decades of sitting?

media:content.media:title: Resurrecting a Barn-Bound Kenworth After 25 Years
media:content.media:description: A Kenworth truck pulled from barn storage after 25 years is carefully inspected, repaired, and brought back toward running condition. What surprises are hidden after decades of sitting?

item.title: CAT 3126 in a '93 Ford F350

item.title: Turning a Forgotten Trailer Into a Gem
item.description: A restoration project focused on bringing an abandoned or worn trailer back to usable condition. The video highlights cleaning, repairs, and transformation work step by step. What part of a restoration do you enjoy most?

media:content.media:title: Turning a Forgotten Trailer Into a Gem
media:content.media:description: A restoration project focused on bringing an abandoned or worn trailer back to usable condition. The video highlights cleaning, repairs, and transformation work step by step. What part of a restoration do you enjoy most?

item.title: Semi Truck Boat Conversion Explained
item.description: A breakdown of an unusual engineering project converting a semi truck into a boat. The video explores design challenges, fabrication work, and how the concept is made functional. What’s the most unusual vehicle conversion you’ve seen?

media:content.media:title: Semi Truck Boat Conversion Explained
media:content.media:description: A breakdown of an unusual engineering project converting a semi truck into a boat. The video explores design challenges, fabrication work, and how the concept is made functional. What’s the most unusual vehicle conversion you’ve seen?
